# zellij — keybindings

## zellij

### Modes

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+p` | Pane mode |
| `Ctrl+t` | Tab mode |
| `Ctrl+n` | Resize mode |
| `Ctrl+s` | Scroll / search mode |
| `Ctrl+o` | Session mode |
| `Ctrl+g` | Lock mode (pass keys through) |

### Panes

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Alt+n` | New pane |
| `Alt+h / Alt+l` | Focus pane left / right |
| `Alt+j / Alt+k` | Focus pane down / up |
| `Alt+f` | Toggle floating panes |
| `Alt+= / Alt+-` | Resize pane grow / shrink |
